title: haplopappus lucidus
intro: Haplopappus lucidus, also known as the silver ragwort or silver daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Haplopappus lucidus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular herbal remedy in modern times.
